note: Provider submodule of fontyourface; import needs a Fonts.com token + project, so cases are recipe (response-graded).

evals.prompt: Which two config keys must be set to import Fonts.com fonts in Drupal's @font-your-face?
evals.expected_output: fontscom_api.settings:token (API token) and fontscom_api.settings:project (project id); the project field appears on the settings form after a token is saved.

evals.prompt: What is the fontyourface provider id and provider name for Fonts.com fonts?
